description: 66 - 08-02-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson and Peter Kyle (former Secretary of State for Science, Innovation and Technology)
text:
(former Secretary of State for Science, Innovation and Technology)

From: Peter Kyle | Personal

Sent: Sat 08/02/2025 10:59:51 PM (UTC)
To: Peter Mandelson Personal
Subject: Re: Munich speech

That’s all v good advice which I’ll action. Thank you.
Sent from my iPhone

On 8 Feb 2025, at 15:56, Peter Mandelson wrote:

OFFICIAL
How is this going ? My further thought is that “

| think it would benefit from more positive
language about Al up front before you get into the security stuff (even
though it is Munich you can still talk economic growth, technological
progress and so on).

tek

| think you should ask the team here to comment on specifics.
P

Sent from Outlook for iO

200
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.

messages.subject: Munich speech
